q: Describe a natural talent that you want to improve
cue_card: How you plan to improve it
And explain why you want to improve it
examiner_note: Hãy tập trung vào việc mô tả chi tiết natural talent that you want to improve.

samples.band7: Well, I'd like to talk about describe a natural talent that you want to improve. It's something I've been interested in for a while. For example, I think it's very important because it helps people relax and learn new things.
samples.band8: Actually, I've always found describe a natural talent that you want to improve to be quite a fascinating subject. From my perspective, it offers a lot of benefits such as improving our mental health and broadening our horizons. I really enjoy exploring this topic further.
samples.band9: Without a doubt, describe a natural talent that you want to improve is a subject that warrants deep exploration.
